case_title: JAVIER CARDONA ET AL VS. DE WOLF REALTY CO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED FEB-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,965.00 FILED BY CARDONA, JAVIER MONGET, CELINE AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARDONA, JAVIER MONGET, CELINE AS TO DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARDONA, JAVIER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-01-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS JAVIER CARDONA & CELINE MONGET ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DE WOLF REALTY CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AARON SINELNIKOFF, EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2140 TO THE PLAINTIFFS (COSTS INCLUDED). THE CHECK WILL BE ISSUED TO JAVIER CARDONA. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APRIL 1ST HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
